caption: A person's hands hold up a sports trading card for a camera, showcasing a player's image and a signature. The card is brown and gold with a player in a white uniform. In the background, a man with a beard wearing a dark blue shirt is seated behind a desk. The desk features a decorative mat with green palm trees and an orange border. A black electronic scale and a white box are also visible on the desk. On-screen graphics in the upper right corners of the frames feature the logo "JASPYS" and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the person holding the card tilts it to catch the light, moving it slightly from left to right and then angling it downward to display the signature more clearly. The man in the background remains seated and watches the card being presented.
